name: Data Access Server
shortDescription: Run a SQL query against the CBR Table Source output
description: Takes the Parquet output from an upstream CBR Table Source node, loads it into DuckDB, and runs your SQL query against it. Write your query in the SQL box; the upstream node's data is available as a table named after it, or as 'input_data' when there is a single input.
inputDescription: Output of a CBR Table Source node to query

name.label: Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this node in the pipeline

sql.label: SQL Query
sql.description: SQL query to run against the CBR Table Source input. The input is available by its dependency name, or as 'input_data' when there is a single input.
